allow: Bash(node -e "require\(''dotenv''\).config\(\); console.log\(''GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID:'', process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID ? ''SET \(''+process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.slice\(0,10\)+''...\)'' : ''NOT SET''\); console.log\(''GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET:'', process.env.GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET ? ''SET'' : ''NOT SET''\); console.log\(''GOOGLE_CALLBACK_URL:'', process.env.GOOGLE_CALLBACK_URL || ''NOT SET \(using default\)''\); console.log\(''CLIENT_URL:'', process.env.CLIENT_URL || ''NOT SET''\);")
